usage: editCopy [-help] [-objects <string>] [-orientation {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90}] [-net <net> | -net_group <string> | -keep_net_name ] [-rotate_point {x y} | -times <integer>] [-rotate_point {x y} | [<dx> <dy>]]

options.name: <dx>
options.description: Specifies the dx distance to move the copied object in microns

options.name: <dy>
options.description: Specifies the dy distance to move the copied object in microns

options.name: -keep_net_name
options.description: Specifies to retain the net name from the original object

options.name: -net
options.description: Specifies net the copied object to be assigned to ((net), optional)

options.name: -net_group
options.description: Allow user assign a new net group name to all new bus guide.

options.name: -objects
options.description: Specifies the object pointers to be copied

options.name: -orientation
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90} The orientation

options.name: -rotate_point
options.description: Rotates around user specified point {x y}.

options.name: -times
options.description: Specifies the copy times for one editCopy operation.
